response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation contexts, has no demonstrated experience with IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial systems, or multi-threaded/high-performance C++ systems required for the role; his C++ exposure is limited to a 6-month academic project and is overshadowed by dominant web/full-stack tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang).
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern tooling and DevOps practices
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to learn and deliver across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ production work in industrial or embedded systems
Lacks experience with core required technologies: MQTT, IEC 62443, STL, message brokers
No evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or industrial cybersecurity implementation
